features: HOT & COLD THERAPY FOR INJURIES: Use warm to ease muscular discomfort or cold to help reduce swelling after sprains, strains and minor sports injuries; a reliable gel ice pack for everyday recovery

COMFORTABLE SOFT NYLON DESIGN: Smooth nylon exterior feels gentle on the skin and keeps the pack flexible when frozen, allowing the cold compress to contour easily around ankles, wrists, knees and elbows

REUSABLE & LONG LASTING: High-quality internal gel reheats or freezes repeatedly, providing durable reusable ice packs for injuries suitable for home use, sports clubs, workplace first aid kits and schools
EASY TO FREEZE OR HEAT: Simply place in the freezer for cooling, or warm in a microwave for 20 seconds, checking before adding 10-second bursts; a dependable cold pack for first aid and daily support
SUSTAINED TEMPERATURE PERFORMANCE: Maintains effective hot or cold therapy for up to 30 minutes, delivering steady relief during recovery, physiotherapy sessions or routine first aid at home or work
COMPACT 13 x 14cm SIZE: Ideal for targeted application on smaller areas where precise temperature control matters; a practical choice for gym bags, office kits, home cupboards and medical rooms
description: Product Description Koolpak 10 x Luxury Hot and Cold Packs provide reliable temperature therapy for sprains, strains, bumps, bruises and everyday aches. Each gel ice pack is coated with soft nylon that feels comfortable against the skin and stays flexible when frozen, allowing it to contour easily around smaller areas of the body. Use each pack cold to help reduce swelling after minor injuries or apply it warm to ease muscular stiffness and general discomfort. These compact gel ice packs are widely used at home, in sports injury kits and in workplace first aid rooms, offering dependable cooling support where it’s needed most. The non-toxic gel freezes quickly, reheats evenly and can be reused repeatedly, making each unit a practical reusable ice pack for both everyday and active use. Many customers choose these as their preferred Koolpak-style cold pack because of their comfort and flexibility. To cool, simply place the pack in the freezer. To heat, warm it in a microwave for 20 seconds, check the temperature, then continue in 10-second bursts if required. The 13 x 14cm size makes the pack ideal for ankles, wrists, elbows, knees and other smaller areas that benefit from a flexible cold compress or warm pack. Each unit maintains effective temperature for up to 30 minutes, providing steady support during recovery, physiotherapy sessions or routine first aid. This pack of ten offers excellent coverage for families, sports teams, schools, workplaces and first responders who need multiple hot and cold packs available at all times. Each gel pack contains a non-toxic blend (Carbomer, Glycerol and Water) and remains supple even at low temperatures for comfortable long-term use. Features: • Soft nylon coating for comfort • Flexible when frozen • Reusable hot or cold therapy • Maintains temperature up to 30 minutes • Compact 13 x 14cm size • Pack of 10 units Indications Pain relief, muscle recovery, injury treatment, reducing inflammation or swelling, managing headaches or migraines, soothing menstrual cramps Ingredients Carbomer, Glycerol, Water Directions To cool down, place in your freezer and allow to cool - normally charged in only 2 hours! To heat up, place the pack in a microwave for 20 seconds and then check - if it requires more heat, follow up with 10 second bursts until hot. Use as a cool pack in the early (acute) stage of a sports injury or following joint surgery to relieve pain, prevent swelling and cool tissue temperature. Also useful for those suffering from fevers, night sweats, headaches, eczema, sunstroke, toothache etc. Use as a hot/heat pack to increase blood flow to the tissue at site of injury to promote healing and relaxation. Hot packs are excellent for non-inflammatory complaints such as sciatica, lumbago (low back pain), muscle ache and muscle tension. Can also help with temporary relief to sinusitis or menstrual cramps. Each pack conforms easily to body contours, whilst the nylon coating is soft to the touch for added patient comfort. Filled with a non toxic gel that can be frozen and heated repeatedly. Durable welded seams prevent splitting during heavy or prolonged use. See more
